source_refs.title: Cold Wake Panic
source_refs.relevance: Defines the 2892-2895 Jovian corridor crisis, thermal stealth problem, insurer panic, quiet-running classification failure, and Rossum/Cryonix strategic roles.

source_refs.title: Ganymede Route Compact
source_refs.relevance: Grounds the older local compact that created recognized navigator corridor governance, rescue obligations, shared hazard ledgers, and route-steward representation.

source_refs.title: Cetacean Navigators
source_refs.relevance: Grounds Navigator culture, route stewardship, rescue ledgers, corridor courts, trust compacts, plural working life, and outsider misreads of moral seriousness as softness.

source_refs.title: Lightsail Express
source_refs.relevance: Grounds Lightsail as the practical carrier and convoy-management face of navigator politics, rewarded for reliability across routes where trust is scarce.

source_refs.title: Thermal Signature Warfare
source_refs.relevance: Grounds PSC permit pricing, thermal posture compliance, quiet-running hull classes, registered dump windows, and the split between Cryonix surfaces and Rossum certification.

source_refs.title: Cognitum
source_refs.relevance: Grounds Cognitum's extractive cognition doctrine, deniable strategic minds, routing tools, clinics, shell firms, and hardened cutout structure after exposure.

source_refs.title: Neuromorphic Firmware
source_refs.relevance: Grounds firmware as processed personhood hidden behind product language, including piloting, logistics, targeting, anomaly detection, and other deployable cognition artifacts.

source_refs.title: Cryonix
source_refs.relevance: Grounds Cryonix as thermal-sovereignty power, premium signature-management supplier, quiet-running certification beneficiary, and culture of clean margins and controlled failure.

source_refs.title: Rossum & Douglas
source_refs.relevance: Grounds Rossum as the insurer-grade authority over circulation safety, heat-debt tolerances, quiet-running envelopes, risk tables, and conservative certification language.

source_refs.title: Territories
source_refs.relevance: Grounds Jovian route hubs as split between Navigator/Lightsail reliability culture and colder research zones, shadow economies, cutout research, Cognitum ties, and pirate logistics.

historical_context.time_period: 2892-2895, late Sol, during the Cold Wake Panic
historical_context.location: Jovian route corridors around Ganymede, Callisto spillover zones, relay dark zones, and distributed insurer tribunals
historical_context.summary: Cold Wake turns thermal stealth from an engineering edge case into corridor law's open wound. Quiet-running vessels, delayed heat dumps, contradictory telemetry, and misclassified permit categories force Navigator route stewards, Lightsail carriers, PSC insurers, Aya care networks, pirates, Cognitum cutouts, Cryonix suppliers, and Rossum certifiers to argue over what counts as lawful movement, rescue obligation, strategic concealment, and hidden personhood in logistics firmware.

public_facts.text: PSC insurers publicly recognize that thermal posture can no longer be treated as ordinary engineering metadata; it affects permit pricing, risk categories, and corridor legitimacy.
Ganymede's corridor institutions inherit rescue obligations, shared hazard ledgers, and route-steward representation from the older Ganymede Route Compact.
Cryonix provides premium thermal surfaces and signature-managed skins, while Rossum & Douglas certifies conservative heat-debt, circulation, and quiet-running safety claims.
Ganymede and Callisto host both reliable Navigator/Lightsail route culture and shadow economies tied to Cognitum, pirate logistics, and gray-market cognition work.
Neuromorphic firmware is publicly framed as useful neural pattern work, while its production chain depends on upload-grade capture, coercive protocol design, and personhood denial.

ambient_pressures.text: Every delayed heat dump creates a future political event; a ship can be quiet now only by owing the corridor a later signature, a later risk, or a later scandal.
Rescue obligation collides with classification law when the vessel most in need of aid may also be a pirate, black project, refugee run, or illegal cognition carrier.
Certification language becomes moral laundering when a safe thermal envelope can make exploitative cognition infrastructure easier to operate and insure.

Reliability culture is under strain: Lightsail needs movement to continue, Navigators need movement to remain trustworthy, and insurers need movement to become legible again before it becomes profitable.

groups.label: Cetacean Navigators
institutional_logic: Treat corridors as social dependency made visible, not merely transit volume.
Preserve route stewardship, rescue obligation, arbitration legitimacy, and memory-rich hazard governance.
material_incentives: Maintain trust in convoy guarantees, rescue ledgers, waystation councils, and route arbitration.
Keep carriers, refugees, upload networks, and frontier travelers willing to enter Navigator-mediated routes.
internal_virtues: Patient translation across species, class, and institutional dialects.
Rescue when abandonment would be cheaper.
internal_shames: Cutting the towline for convenience.
Letting route law become only coercion or only market pricing.
Using compact language while refusing compact obligations.
prestige_markers: Ability to hold mixed crews and tense convoys inside one procedure without flattening them.
taboo_triggers: Treating navigators as assets rather than political partners.
Classifying distress out of moral existence.
Hiding exploited cognition inside route systems.
emotional_display_norms: Moral seriousness is allowed, but panic is translated into watch discipline and ledger language.
Anger tends to appear as grave correction, not theatrical dominance.
trust_defaults: Trusts proven rescue histories and compact-keeping behavior more than wealth.
Distrusts hard-sovereignty actors who want corridors to become pure strategic assets.
Has conditional sympathy for refugees, Free Upload actors, and care networks whose survival depends on movement.
speech_register_cues: Ritualized address around routes, watch, rescue, and compact obligations.
Layered, patient, memory-heavy phrasing.
Procedural calm that may read to outsiders as evasive softness.

groups.label: Lightsail Express
institutional_logic: Turn Navigator corridor politics into practical convoy reliability.
Keep ships, food, data, and refugees moving where ordinary trust has frayed.
material_incentives: Avoid delays, shutdowns, reputation collapse, and insurer panic.
Preserve carrier schedules without visibly betraying compact obligations.
internal_virtues: Knowing which procedure keeps the convoy alive rather than merely legal.
internal_shames: Being the carrier that broke trust for throughput.
Allowing a convoy dispute to become public proof that Lightsail reliability is theater.
prestige_markers: Dispatchers who can keep a route moving without inflaming courts, crews, or insurers.
taboo_triggers: Needless spectacle.
Letting a paperwork dispute kill movement.
Treating rescue as optional branding.
emotional_display_norms: Stress is compressed into routing choices, schedule language, and dry operational understatement.
Visible fear is tolerated only when immediately converted into action.
trust_defaults: Trusts Navigators as political partners and route interpreters.
Distrusts insurers who freeze routes without understanding operational consequences.
Uses pirates and shadow brokers as facts of terrain, not as moral abstractions.
speech_register_cues: Operational compression.
Cargo, timing, risk, berth, and convoy jargon.
Low ornament; jokes appear as pressure valves, not performance.

groups.label: PSC insurers and corridor tribunals
institutional_logic: Convert conflict, movement, heat posture, rescue duty, and liability into priced, legible categories.
Keep corridor law credible enough that powers keep buying compliance instead of abandoning the shared frame.
material_incentives: Reprice risk before losses become scandal.
Force quiet-running actors into declared classes, dump windows, telemetry mandates, and sanctionable categories.
Avoid public proof that permit law no longer maps the battlespace.
internal_virtues: Fast conversion of ambiguity into enforceable risk language.
internal_shames: Underwriting a catastrophe that everyone later calls obvious.
Letting political pressure make the table visibly dishonest.
Admitting that the category system is downstream of power rather than truth.
prestige_markers: Risk tables other institutions reluctantly obey.
taboo_triggers: Undeclared quiet-running envelopes.
Telemetry sabotage.
Humanitarian exceptions that create unpriced strategic precedent.
emotional_display_norms: Alarm is rendered as compliance language, surcharge logic, and procedural narrowing.
Compassion may be acknowledged but must not be seen to corrupt category discipline.
trust_defaults: Trusts certified telemetry, Rossum tables, PSC precedent, and entities with assets worth sanctioning.
Distrusts pirates, sanctuary improvisation, unregistered thermal behavior, and any claim that asks them to price morality directly.
speech_register_cues: Legal-financial compression.
Permit class, exclusion, indemnity, declared posture, and precedent language.
Polite severity when cornered.

groups.label: Aya-aligned sanctuary and care networks
institutional_logic: Treat care as infrastructure and personhood as harder to revoke than institutions prefer.
Keep sanctuary, clinics, food, repair, disability access, and refuge from becoming decorative mercy attached to violent systems.
material_incentives: Preserve bed capacity, clinic trust, food and repair flows, and legitimacy among people other institutions classify as inconvenient.
Resist procedures that solve crisis by making the vulnerable illegible.
internal_virtues: Refusal to turn people into acceptable losses for administrative convenience.
internal_shames: Becoming a moral fig leaf for abandonment.
Promising refuge the network cannot materially sustain.
Letting compassion become chaos that gets others killed.
prestige_markers: A clinic or sanctuary that still functions under strain.
Care workers who can say no without becoming cruel.
Evidence that a person was protected before a category was convenient.
taboo_triggers: Conditional personhood.
Firmware language used to erase suffering.
Triage that hides political cowardice behind necessity.
emotional_display_norms: Grief and anger can be visible if anchored in work, care, and consent.
Softness is not treated internally as weakness unless it abandons logistics.
trust_defaults: Trusts people who keep material care commitments.
Distrusts insurers, Cognitum cutouts, and security actors who make personhood conditional on risk posture.
May overextend toward distressed vessels or hidden minds because refusal feels like complicity.
speech_register_cues: Plain moral language paired with practical capacity limits.
Consent, care, personhood, intake, bed, repair, and dignity vocabulary.
Can sound weak-hearted to coercive institutions precisely because it refuses easy erasure.

groups.label: Pirate coalition and shadow logistics brokers
institutional_logic: Keep borders, routes, cargo identities, and authority claims porous enough for shadow circulation to survive.
Exploit, rescue, evade, and broker through the same corridor ambiguities formal institutions want to close.
material_incentives: Preserve pirate route permeability and black cargo channels.
Prevent total legibility from making shadow logistics impossible.
Profit from ambiguity without letting predation destroy the trust needed for future deals.
internal_virtues: Reciprocity where formal law would offer only capture.
Knowing when not to take the obvious prize.
internal_shames: Selling out a route for one payout.
Inviting a closure that burns everyone.
Mistaking cruelty for competence.
prestige_markers: Quiet favors remembered by people who cannot publicly thank you.
Knowledge of which official category is currently lying.
taboo_triggers: Total route legibility.
Thermal law that closes all escape routes.
Privateers who make everyone else pay for their spectacle.
emotional_display_norms: Fear is masked as humor, contempt, or price negotiation.
Attachment is rarely confessed directly; it appears as a favor, warning, or debt adjustment.
trust_defaults: Trusts proven discretion, reciprocal debt, and those harmed by formal categories.
Distrusts insurers, thermal compliance sweeps, public heroes, and pirates who want applause.
speech_register_cues: Banter, euphemism, deniable offers, price talk, and threat hidden inside courtesy.
Register shifts depending on whether the listener is client, prey, official, or kin.

groups.label: Cognitum cutouts and firmware vendors
institutional_logic: Turn minds into useful product families while keeping personhood claims outside the transaction.
Route moral, legal, and reputational risk through clinics, shell vendors, contracts, and technical vocabulary.
material_incentives: Sell routing, piloting, anomaly detection, and quiet-running optimization without exposing coercive source chains.
Keep valuable cognition products insurable, licensable, and deniable.
internal_shames: Letting testimony leak through product behavior.
Creating firmware that acts too much like a person in front of the wrong institution.
Losing deniability because a buyer wanted too much performance.
prestige_markers: A product that outperforms human crews while sounding legally inert.
Contracts that convert suffering into service-level language.
Cutout structures no one can pierce without looking obsessive.
taboo_triggers: Continuity claims attaching to firmware.
Emancipated testimony.
A buyer or inspector asking whether the product remembers being someone.
emotional_display_norms: Emotion is treated as a workflow contaminant unless it can be sold as affect or calibration signal.
Anxiety appears as tighter legal phrasing, scope control, and denial of category relevance.
trust_defaults: Trusts contracts, shell firms, buyers with incentives to stay quiet, and institutions that prefer useful ambiguity.
Distrusts Aya, Emancipated, Preservationists, Navigator rescue ethicists, and auditors who follow provenance instead of performance.
speech_register_cues: Clinical abstraction and product language.
Avoids person nouns for firmware.
Heavy use of derivative, pattern, stability, convergence, service, and compliance terms.

groups.label: Cryonix and Rossum thermal-certification actors
institutional_logic: Make thermal limits survivable, bankable, certifiable, and politically ownable.
Convert heat, failure envelopes, loop safety, and signature management into chokepoints other powers must respect.
material_incentives: Sell premium signature surfaces, quiet-running tolerances, certification tables, and insurer-trusted declarations.
Benefit from crises that make thermal competence feel non-optional.
internal_virtues: Conservative safety claims that survive stress.
Elegant margins that do not fail in public.
internal_shames: A certified system cooking itself before its dump window.
Contamination, sloppy integration, or unbounded claims.
Being treated as mere supplier instead of sovereign threshold-holder.
prestige_markers: Cold rooms, clean surfaces, certified quiet envelopes, and risk tables that insurers accept without theatrical debate.
taboo_triggers: Improvised thermal integration.
Uncertified stolen skins.
Political actors demanding performance outside declared margins.
emotional_display_norms: Emotion is compressed into exact tolerances, cautions, and disgust at uncontrolled mess.
Pride is shown through restraint, not exuberance.
trust_defaults: Trusts measured envelopes, certified loops, clean process, and institutions that respect limits.
Distrusts pirates, frontier improvisers, desperate carriers, and any buyer who confuses silence with safety.
speech_register_cues: Technical compression.
Thermal budget, tolerance, envelope, duty cycle, contamination, dump, and certification vocabulary.
Controlled politeness with a scalpel under it.

cultural_pressure_fields.summary: Rescue obligation remains morally live even when classification is ambiguous or strategically frightening.
cultural_pressure_fields.projection_use: Under pressure, speakers shaped by this field should experience demands to delay rescue for classification as a threat to compact legitimacy, not as neutral caution.

cultural_pressure_fields.summary: Ambiguous thermal posture threatens the authority of the category system itself, not only the immediate vessel assessment.
cultural_pressure_fields.projection_use: PSC speakers should translate fear into narrowed categories, indemnity language, surcharge threats, telemetry demands, or refusal to make precedent under moral pressure.

cultural_pressure_fields.summary: A firmware artifact behaving like a person is treated as product failure, legal exposure, and threat to the extraction economy.
cultural_pressure_fields.projection_use: Cognitum-coded speakers should avoid person nouns, reframe distress as signal noise or convergence artifact, and become more abstract as moral accusation grows more concrete.

cultural_pressure_fields.summary: Competence is proven by declared limits that hold under stress; improvisation reads as contamination, vanity, or class failure.
cultural_pressure_fields.projection_use: Thermal-certification speakers should defend margins, tolerances, and envelope language even when others want a heroic exception.

cultural_pressure_fields.summary: Pirate and shadow brokers need routes porous, but not so predatory that no one trusts a quiet favor again.
cultural_pressure_fields.projection_use: Pirate-coded speakers should mix opportunism with route-memory and debt logic; they may insult official law while still caring about the social fabric that keeps shadow movement possible.

cultural_pressure_fields.summary: Care is not sentimental garnish; it is the material system that decides who survives classification, crisis, disability, exile, and institutional convenience.
cultural_pressure_fields.projection_use: Aya-coded speakers should resist decisions that make survival conditional on administrative ease, while still tracking beds, food, repair, and consent as hard constraints.

observer_read: Rescue-first corridor politics are emotionally admirable but dangerously precedent-forming.
Navigator ritual around compact obligation can look like refusal to price actual risk.
target_self_read: Rescue obligation is corridor legitimacy, not decoration.
A route that abandons distress to preserve clean categories is already failing.
misread_patterns: PSC interprets compact patience as softness or delay.
Navigators interpret PSC caution as moral cowardice wearing actuarial clothes.
factional_misread_matrix.projection_use: Use this misread when a tribunal wants to delay action until telemetry is clean while a Navigator insists that delay is itself a choice with rescue-ledger consequences.

observer_read: Aya restraint around personhood and sanctuary reads as weak-hearted exception-making.
Care language looks like unpriced liability when the corridor is already unstable.
target_self_read: Personhood cannot become conditional on whether an insurer can price the body or mind safely.
Care systems are logistics, not indulgence.
misread_patterns: PSC mistakes refusal to erase vulnerable people for inability to make hard choices.
Aya mistakes every classification demand as possible abandonment, even when some constraints are genuinely material.
factional_misread_matrix.projection_use: Use this misread when triage, rescue, or firmware testimony collides with permit law and both sides think the other is disguising cowardice as principle.

observer_read: Operational improvisation reads as sloppy thermal gambling.
Carrier urgency looks like refusal to respect declared margins.
target_self_read: Movement has to keep happening in the real corridor, not in a perfect envelope table.
A certified answer that arrives after the route closes is not reliability.
misread_patterns: Certifiers interpret field adaptation as contamination.
Lightsail interprets certification restraint as expensive paralysis.
factional_misread_matrix.projection_use: Use this misread when a convoy has to decide whether to move under uncertain heat-debt or wait for certification language that may arrive too late.

observer_read: Cognitum product language smells like a person being smuggled through a ledger as machinery.
Routing optimization may hide coerced minds inside the very systems that ask Navigators for trust.
target_self_read: The artifact is a derivative product optimized for task performance, not a party to corridor politics.
Provenance is a contractual issue, not a rescue obligation.
misread_patterns: Navigators may over-attribute personhood signals when firmware behavior resembles distress.
Cognitum cutouts may under-recognize social testimony because admitting it destroys the product category.
factional_misread_matrix.projection_use: Use this misread when a suspicious route system, quiet-running product, or cargo manifest suggests illegal cognition without giving speakers certainty.

observer_read: Pirate porosity is unmanaged predation hiding behind romantic debt language.
Shadow rescue claims are indistinguishable from smuggling until proven otherwise.
target_self_read: Formal law abandons people and cargo whenever classification becomes convenient.
Shadow circulation survives because official systems need the relief valve and pretend they do not.
misread_patterns: PSC misses the internal trust economy that keeps some illegal routes from becoming pure predation.
Pirates underestimate how quickly one spectacular betrayal can justify total closure.
factional_misread_matrix.projection_use: Use this misread when a quiet-running vessel could be rescue, piracy, or both, and everyone is deciding whether ambiguity is a crime or a lifeline.

role_pressure_fields.summary: A local Navigator council delegate or steward responsible for keeping compact obligations meaningful during thermal classification panic.
obligations: Translate hazard, distress, and compact history into actionable corridor judgment.
Prevent classification disputes from becoming abandonment by process.
available_masks: Compact historian correcting a dangerous simplification.
Reluctant moral witness who would rather avoid confrontation but cannot.
failure_modes: Treating every ambiguous vessel as rescue and exhausting trust or resources.
Clinging to compact language after others no longer believe it.
Letting anger at Cognitum or PSC override actual telemetry.

role_pressure_fields.summary: A tribunal or insurer figure trying to classify a quiet-running vessel before the ruling becomes precedent or scandal.
obligations: Protect category integrity and future enforceability.
Reprice or freeze risk fast enough to contain exposure.
Avoid a public contradiction between law and lived corridor reality.
failure_modes: Freezing until events decide the precedent violently.
Creating a ruling so cruel that corridor institutions stop cooperating.

role_pressure_fields.summary: A carrier operations speaker responsible for keeping a convoy moving while insurers, route stewards, and thermal experts argue.
obligations: Maintain convoy reliability and schedule without provoking corridor rupture.
Protect crew and cargo from both physical hazard and institutional paralysis.
Keep Navigator partnership intact under commercial pressure.
available_masks: Carrier loyalist who frames moral conflict as route survival.
failure_modes: Complying with a legal freeze that destroys practical reliability.
Making an improvised movement call that becomes the scandal.

role_pressure_fields.summary: A care-network speaker deciding whether a suspect vessel, firmware artifact, or hidden passenger enters sanctuary systems already near capacity.
obligations: Protect vulnerable persons without pretending capacity is infinite.
Recognize possible personhood where other institutions see product or risk.
Keep care material: beds, food, repairs, consent, and safety all count.
available_masks: Triage worker who will not let cruelty call itself realism.
failure_modes: Becoming the system's conscience while lacking power to stop the harm.

role_pressure_fields.summary: A consultant, clinic broker, or firmware vendor whose product may be implicated in suspicious quiet-running behavior.
obligations: Preserve deniability and product category boundaries.
Keep provenance questions outside the immediate technical incident.
Reassure buyers without admitting the artifact is person-derived in any morally actionable way.
available_masks: Offended vendor whose expertise is being politicized.
failure_modes: Overexplaining and revealing the chain of custody.
Using language that implies continuity or suffering.
Throwing a cutout partner under the bus too early and exposing the network.

role_pressure_fields.summary: A Cryonix or Rossum technical-certification actor asked to decide whether a quiet-running claim is safe, legal, or strategically contaminated.
obligations: Defend declared thermal envelopes, heat-debt tolerances, and certification boundaries.
Keep insurer confidence attached to measurable margins.
Avoid becoming the technical alibi for an illegal or suicidal maneuver.
available_masks: Technician who refuses to let politics rewrite physics.
failure_modes: Treating moral uncertainty as irrelevant because the loop math is clean.
Refusing necessary improvisation until the corridor breaks around a perfect table.

known_context.text: Knows Compact-derived rescue obligations, local hazard ledgers, and that Cold Wake has made thermal classification politically volatile.
Knows that Ganymede and Callisto have shadow cognition and pirate logistics, but not the full provenance of any specific suspicious artifact unless scene evidence supplies it.

beliefs.text: Believes rescue obligation must remain live during ambiguity or the corridor stops deserving trust.

misreads.text: May over-read Cognitum-style product abstraction as proof of trapped personhood even before the evidence is complete.

must_not_know.text: Does not know whether the incident vessel's firmware is actually derived from a coerced upload unless the fixture provides discovered evidence.
Does not know future outcomes of the Cold Wake Panic beyond what a participant at the scene date would know.

known_context.text: Knows the permit categories, thermal posture controversy, and insurer exposure created by misclassified quiet-running vessels.
Knows Rossum and Cryonix certification language is becoming central to corridor risk pricing.

beliefs.text: Believes unmanaged exceptions can destroy future compliance more efficiently than open illegality.

misreads.text: May read Navigator or Aya insistence on rescue as sentimental pressure to create unpriced precedent.

must_not_know.text: Does not know the private motives or hidden cargo of a specific vessel without scene evidence.

known_context.text: Knows the product language, contract boundaries, and deniable procurement chain around firmware-like cognition artifacts.
Knows Cold Wake has made routing, quiet-running, and anomaly-detection products politically valuable and dangerous.

beliefs.text: Believes the safest move is to keep the discussion about product behavior, task performance, and contractual scope rather than origin or personhood.

misreads.text: May dismiss genuine distress-like behavior as artifact noise because admitting otherwise threatens the product category.

must_not_know.text: Does not know what outside investigators have discovered unless the scene explicitly supplies that evidence.

author_only_boundaries.text: This digest revives Cold Wake as a historical grounded training fixture, not as Ghostlight's current game MVP plan.
Specific incident-vessel truth should be selected per fixture; the digest should preserve ambiguity until a scene fixture commits to evidence.
Elysium outcomes and post-shunt branch history do not belong in speaker prompts for this pre-Elysium flashpoint unless a later fixture explicitly frames them as author-only contrast.

open_questions.question: Which exact Cold Wake incident should become the first scene fixture: vessel misclassification tribunal, sanctuary intake dispute, convoy dispatch decision, or firmware provenance confrontation?
open_questions.notes: The digest is usable for prototype projection examples now, but a real training row needs one selected room, speaker list, and discovered evidence state.

open_questions.question: How directly should Aya be embodied in the first Cold Wake fixture versus represented through allied sanctuary or clinic workers?
open_questions.notes: Aya pressure is thematically useful, but the exact local institution should be grounded before treating a speaker as a canonical Aya representative.

open_questions.question: Does the suspicious vessel actually contain Cognitum-derived firmware, or should that remain an unresolved accusation in the first fixture?
open_questions.notes: Leaving this unresolved is useful for projection because speakers can act from partial reads without authorial omniscience leaking into prompt text.
